message:
🌱 Add containerd: containerd-shim processes leak during high pod churn mission (#1541)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,80 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "containerd-12344-containerd-shim-processes-leak-during-high-pod-churn",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "containerd: containerd-shim processes leak during high pod churn",
+    "description": "containerd-shim processes leak during high pod churn. This issue affects 7+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify containerd troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your containerd deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n containerd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=containerd
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=containerd -n containerd --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review containerd configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant containerd configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n containerd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=containerd
kubectl get configmap -n containerd -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=containerd
```
## Problem Description

containerd-shim-runc-v2 processes are leaking under high pod churn scenarios in containerd
v2.x, causing gradual memory growth and process accumulation on nodes."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for containerd-shim processes leak during high pod churn",
+        "description": "Based on current information, I think it's known issue. If we can allow to delete shim multiple times after failure, it should be fixed easily. Any retry here is just workaround. More information is here - https://github.com/containerd/containerd/issues/8981
```yaml
helm repo add prometheus-community https://prometheus-community.github.io/helm-charts
helm repo update

helm install monitoring prometheus-community/kube-prometheus-stack \
  --create-namespace --namespace monitoring \
  --set grafana.adminPassword=xxxx

# setup port forwarding
# this makes the dashboard available at http://localhost:3000
kubectl port-forward -n monitoring svc/monitoring-grafana 3000:80
```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm containerd-shim processes leak during high pod… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=containerd -n containerd --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n containerd --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Based on current information, I think it's known issue. If we can allow to delete shim multiple times after failure, it should be fixed easily. Any retry here is just workaround. More information is here - https://github.com/containerd/containerd/issues/8981",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "helm repo add prometheus-community https://prometheus-community.github.io/helm-charts
helm repo update

helm install monitoring prometheus-community/kube-prometheus-stack \
  --create-namespace --namespace monitoring \
  --set grafana.adminPassword=xxxx

# setup port forwarding
# this makes the dashboard available at http://localhost:3000
kubectl port-forward -n monitoring svc/monitoring-grafana 3000:80",
+        "# Create 200 CronJobs with direct kubectl apply
for i in $(seq 1 200); do
  kubectl apply -f - << EOF
apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: CronJob
metadata:
  name: test-cronjob-$i
  namespace: cronjob-test
spec:
  schedule: "* * * * *"
  successfulJobsHistoryLimit: 3
  failedJobsHistoryLimit: 1
  concurrencyPolicy: Replace
  jobTemplate:
    spec:
      activeDeadlineSeconds: 30
      template:
        spec:
          containers:
          - name: test-job
            image: busybox:latest
            imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
            command:
            - /bin/sh
            - -c
            - |
              dd if=/dev/zero of=/dev/shm/test bs=1M count=30
              sleep 3
            resources:
              requests:
                memory: "50Mi"
                cpu: "10m"
       ",
+        "$ ps axo pid,ppid,lstart,stat,pcpu,pmem,comm --forest | grep -A 5 'containerd-shim'

419179       1 18:20:51 Sl    0.0  0.2 containerd-shim
419207  419179 18:20:51 Ss    0.0  0.0  \_ pause
419233  419179 18:20:51 Ssl   0.1  0.2  \_ node_exporter
419321       1 18:20:52 Sl    0.0  0.2 containerd-shim
419376  419321 18:20:52 Ss    0.0  0.0  \_ pause
419460  419321 18:20:52 Ssl   2.0  3.0  \_ kube-state-metr
419400       1 18:20:52 Sl    0.0  0.2 containerd-shim
419428  419400 18:20:52 Ss    0.0  0.0  \_ pause
419493  419400 18:20:52 Ssl   0.2  0.8  \_ operator
419619       1 18:20:53 Sl    0.1  0.2 containerd-shim
419716  419619 18:20:53 Ss    0.0  0.0  \_ pause
419909  419619 18:20:54 Ss    0.1  0.9  \_ python
420364  419909 18:21:05 S     0.0  0.9  |   \_ python
420365  419909 18:21:05 S  "
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "containerd",
+      "graduated",
+      "runtime",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],

+      "containerd"
+    ],

+      "Pod",
+      "Cronjob",
+      "Namespace"
+    ],

+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",

+      "issue": "https://github.com/containerd/containerd/issues/12344",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/containerd/containerd"
+    },
+    "reactions": 7,

+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },

+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",

+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with containerd installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
